title: House Robber
problem_statement: Given a list of non-negative integers representing money in houses, maximize robbery amount without robbing adjacent houses.
intuition: Decide for each house whether to rob it or skip it based on prior results.

approaches.name: Linear DP with constant space
approaches.description: Track the best amount when robbing or skipping each house and update iteratively.
approaches.why_not: Brute forcing all subsets is exponential and unnecessary.

interview_qa.q: What recurrence does House Robber use?
interview_qa.a: rob[i] = max(rob[i-1], rob[i-2] + nums[i]) because we cannot rob adjacent houses.
Only keep the last two best values instead of the full dp array.
